name: Yangtze Basin
depletionRate: Low-Moderate — glacier retreat reducing dry-season base flow
description: The Yangtze is China's longest river, supporting over 400 million people and one-third of China's GDP. While overall water availability is high, the 2022 drought — the worst in 60 years — caused hydropower shortfalls and exposed Poyang Lake bed. Tibetan glacier retreat threatens long-term dry-season base flows.
